title: Create Point Blank
description: A mod that adds craftable guns to create using Vic's Point Blank
body:
# Create point blank

This is a mod and Point blank content pack that adds guns to Create mod

it adds 9 guns as of 2.0

## Installation (important)

### for version 1.0

The .jar goes in your mods folder as standard

The .zip however is different
- Create a folder in your game directory called "pointblank"
- drag the .zip inside it, dont unzip it

### for version 2.0 and beyond

- Create a folder in your game directory called "pointblank"
- drag the .zip inside it, dont unzip it

## if you want to get rid of the default point blank guns use this mod [VPB: Too Many Guns](https://modrinth.com/mod/vpb-too-many-guns)

## Weapon list (as of 2.0)
- Andesite shotgun (shotgun)
- Brass pistol (pistol)
- Copper Double Barrel(shotgun)
- Copper Bolt action(sniper)
- L4-v4(assault rifle)
- Brass Grenade Launcher(grenade launcher)
- Schematic(arm)cannon
- Handheld Press(mele)
- Brass smg(smg)

## Extra
- do NOT reUpload to other sites
